title: Role definition
description: Canonical, hand-edited role definition consumed by lifecycle scripts. One file per role. Source of truth — not derived. All access (including M365 license SKUs via group-based licensing) is modeled as AD security or distribution group membership; no separate license or Entra-group fields. Provenance for changes lives in git history; reviewers populate the optional 'review' block to record formal review of the file's current state.

schemaVersion.description: Schema contract version. Bump on any breaking change.

displayName.description: Human-readable role name — the canonical JobTitle. JobTitle is the role's identity.

department.description: Department slug. Used for namespacing roleId and human grouping.

notes.description: Free-text notes (exceptions, rationale for manual edits, hand-edit context).

review.description: Most-recent formal review of this file's contents. Populate when an entitlement reviewer signs off on the role definition (recertification, post-change review, periodic re-attestation).

reviewedBy.description: Identifier of the reviewer — typically email or GitHub handle.

ticketRef.description: Reference to the change/recertification ticket that justified or accompanied this review.

entitlements.description: Canonical AD group memberships granted by the role. M365 license SKUs are conferred indirectly via group-based licensing on entries in securityGroups; do not enumerate them separately.

securityGroups.description: AD security group DNs granted by the role.

distributionGroups.description: AD distribution group DNs granted by the role.
